# FourSight Lab

> FourSight Lab is an AI and data intelligence consultancy that builds custom AI systems for businesses — including RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, predictive analytics, churn prediction models, document data extraction, and intelligent data pipelines.

We help organizations turn raw data into decisive action through tailored AI solutions. Our approach is problem-first: we start with your business challenge, then choose the right technology — whether that's a neural network, a rule-based system, or something simpler.

## What we build

- **RAG Systems**: AI-powered document search that lets teams query thousands of internal files (contracts, reports, emails) in plain English.
- **Predictive Analytics**: Models that forecast customer behavior, equipment failures, and market trends.
- **Custom AI Models**: Specialized models for fraud detection, quality control, demand forecasting, and domain-specific challenges.
- **Data Pipeline Automation**: Intelligent pipelines that clean, transform, and analyze data continuously.
- **Real-time Analytics**: Live data systems for decision-making as data flows in.
- **Smart Recommendations**: Recommendation engines for inventory, marketing, and operational decisions.

## Proven solutions

- **Churn & Acquisition Models**: Identify customers likely to leave and the actions that retain them. Documented reductions in customer churn of up to 87%.
- **Document Data Extraction**: Extract text, tables, and structured data from PDFs, invoices, contracts, and forms — eliminating manual data entry.

- [Data Pipeline Automation](https://foursightlab.com/data-pipeline-automation.html): Automated data processing.
- [Real-time Analytics](https://foursightlab.com/real-time-analytics.html): Live data insights.
- [Smart Recommendations](https://foursightlab.com/smart-recommendations.html): Recommendation engines.
- [Churn & Acquisition Models](https://foursightlab.com/churn-acquisition-models.html): Customer retention AI.
